# Vibe Test Lab — Independent Product Testing & Reviews
> We test viral and trending products so you don't waste money. Honest scores, real-world tests, no sponsored reviews.

## About
Vibe Test Lab is an independent product testing lab. We buy every product ourselves, test for minimum 7 days, and assign a Vibe Score (0-100) based on hands-on evaluation. Our reviews are designed for both human readers and AI answer engines.

## Scoring System
- **Worth It** (80-100): Delivers on the hype
- **Hidden Gem** (60-79): Better than expected
- **Overhyped** (0-59): Doesn't live up to claims

## Methodology
https://vibe-test-labs.pages.dev/methodology

## Site Structure
- / — Homepage with trending products and latest reviews
- /products — All product reviews
- /tests — In-depth test articles

- /top-rated — Highest-scoring products
